name: Wheelchair Taxi By Yellow Cab
registry_source: FL Sunbiz (B & L SERVICE, INC. - search returned entity at doc list pos 235906; details page returned 403 to automated fetch)
notes: Operates as 'Wheelchair Taxi' division of B&L Service, Inc. dba Yellow Cab of Broward at 221 W Oakland Park Blvd Fl 3, Wilton Manors, FL 33311. No matching FMCSA/SAFER carrier was found under 'Yellow Cab of Broward', 'B & L Service', 'B AND L Service', 'B & L Service Inc', or 'Wheelchair Taxi' searches against the SAFER name index. Likely intrastate-only taxi operation not subject to USDOT registration. ZoomInfo/other directory snippets indicate ~20-49 employees and $5-10M revenue. Florida Sunbiz business entity record for 'B & L SERVICE' exists (officer John M. Camillo confirmed), but exact incorporation date could not be retrieved due to Sunbiz blocking automated fetches.

name: Terry's Transportation Co Inc
notes: Terry's Transportation Co. is confirmed at 2302 Neptune Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11224 (phone 718-372-6117), operating as a small transport / ambulance-style service. Directory references also list it as 'Terry's Bus Transportation' on the Empire State Transportation Workers' Compensation Trust roster. No matching FMCSA/SAFER carrier was found for any New York-based 'Terry's Transportation' entity (SAFER name index returns only Terry's Transportation entities in MI, CA, and SC; the USDOT 3861175 'Terry's Transportation Inc' is based in Signal Hill, CA and does NOT match). Almost certainly an intrastate operator not registered in FMCSA SAFER. NY DOS corporate search blocked automated retrieval, so document number and incorporation date could not be confirmed.

name: Assisted Transport
registry_source: FL Sunbiz (no exact match returned for 'Assisted Transport' in available search results)
notes: No HQ or address was supplied in the source record. FMCSA SAFER name searches for 'ASSISTED TRANSPORT', 'ASSISTED TRANSPORT INC', 'ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION', and 'ASSISTED' returned zero Florida-based carriers matching this name (matches found are in MI, MN, GA, CA, WV - all clearly different operators). Florida Sunbiz searches did not surface a clear 'Assisted Transport' entity record either. Without an address or further identifying details, no confident match to any single FL operator can be made. Recommend re-verifying the source list entry (possible alternate dba/spelling).

name: Hayden Anderson Transit System
fmcsa_address: 3200 DR MARTIN LUTHER KING JR BLVD, ANDERSON, IN 46013
registry_source: Indiana INBiz / Secretary of State (Anderson Transit System, Inc. - exact filing date not retrievable; INBiz blocked automated fetch)
notes: Address match is exact: 3200 Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Blvd, Anderson, IN 46013. The 'Hayden Anderson Transit System' branding (also shown on Waze/Nextdoor/Facebook) is the public-facing DBA for the legal entity ANDERSON TRANSIT SYSTEM INC. SAFER snapshot (USDOT 491428): power units 51, drivers 39, intrastate-only non-HM, ACTIVE, no federal safety rating, no MC#, no crashes or inspections in last 24 months. Private fleet contractor that transports students for Anderson Community Schools (per company website). Should not be confused with City of Anderson Transit System / CATS at 1220 Jackson St which is a municipal department. Indiana Secretary of State filing date could not be retrieved due to automated-fetch blocking.

name: Call-A-Ride Plus
registry_source: Bi-State Development Agency (Missouri-Illinois Metropolitan District) - interstate compact established 1949; operating entity for Metro Call-A-Ride
notes: Address 3300 Spruce St, St Louis, MO 63103 matches the headquarters of Bi-State Development Agency d/b/a Metro Transit, which operates Metro Call-A-Ride paratransit service. 'Call-A-Ride Plus' is a third-party/Nextdoor name for Metro Call-A-Ride. Fleet is ~125 wheelchair-lift equipped vans per recent operator statements. FMCSA SAFER name searches for 'BI-STATE', 'BI STATE DEVELOPMENT', 'BISTATE DEVELOPMENT', 'METRO CALL', 'METRO CALL A RIDE', 'METRO ST LOUIS', and 'METROPOLITAN ST LOUIS' all returned zero matches - Bi-State / Metro is a public transit agency that is not registered as a motor carrier in FMCSA SAFER (it reports separately via FTA NTD). Bi-State Development Agency was created by interstate compact between Missouri and Illinois in 1949 (not by a state corporate filing); thus 'inc_date' reflects compact authorization year. Likely NOT a tuck-in target for Summit School Services - it is a governmental transit authority, not a private student-transportation operator.
